nodes.name: infra
nodes.en: The infra compose stack: shared platform services every other stack leans on — reverse proxy, identity, and the relational and key-value stores.

nodes.name: postgresql
nodes.en: PostgreSQL 16, the estate's shared OLTP store. The relational home for services that need transactions and SQL — distinct from the key-value cache beside it.

nodes.name: redis
nodes.en: Redis, the shared key-value cache and ephemeral queue backend. Holds hot state, sessions and work queues; nothing durable lives here.
